rule_text: Setup: use every cell of an empty 3×3 board. Player 0 moves first; turns alternate, and each move places one stone on an empty cell. A player's first stone may be placed on any empty cell. Every placement may have at most 1 enemy stone within one king move of it. A player wins by completing a straight horizontal or vertical line of 3 friendly stones. If the next player has no legal placement and the previous move did not win, the previous player wins.
